# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build Notifications

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, edited, synchronize, reopened, ready_for_review]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
      PR_BODY: ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
      PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
      PR_URL: ${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}
      PR_HEAD_SHA: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}

      - name: Capture PR metadata
        id: pr
        run: |
          {
            echo "title<<EOF"
            echo "${PR_TITLE}"
            echo "EOF"
            echo "body<<EOF"
            echo "${PR_BODY}"
            echo "EOF"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Build
        run: |
          echo "Building PR #${PR_NUMBER}"
          echo "Title: ${PR_TITLE}"
          echo "Description: ${PR_BODY}"

      - name: Send notification
        run: |
          echo "Notification payload:"
          printf '%s\n' "PR #${PR_NUMBER}" "Title: ${PR_TITLE}" "Description: ${PR_BODY}" "URL: ${PR_URL}"

      - name: Create tracking commit message
        run: |
          echo "Commit message: ${PR_TITLE} (#${PR_NUMBER})"

      - name: Release notes annotation
        run: |
          echo "Release Notes Entry:"
          echo "- ${PR_TITLE}"
          echo "${PR_BODY}"
